data.title: Microsoft Stock Declines Over 7% Following Q4 2025 Earnings Report
data.description:
Microsoft's stock, trading under the symbol $MSFT, experienced a significant decline of over 7% following the release of its Q4 2025 earnings report. The Kobeissi Letter posted on X that the drop was primarily attributed to a slowdown in the company's cloud growth, which has been a key driver of its revenue in recent years.

The earnings report revealed that while Microsoft continues to see growth in its cloud services, the pace has decelerated compared to previous quarters. This slowdown has raised concerns among investors, leading to the sharp decline in stock value.

Microsoft's cloud segment, which includes Azure and other cloud services, has been a major contributor to the company's overall financial performance. However, the latest figures suggest that the rapid expansion seen in earlier periods is beginning to taper off.

Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to determine whether this trend will continue and how it might impact Microsoft's future growth prospects. The company's ability to innovate and adapt in the competitive cloud market will be crucial in maintaining investor confidence and sustaining its market position.

data.title: Benefits of Tokenized Stocks Highlighted by Investment Expert
data.description: Matt Hougan, chief investment officer at Bitwise Asset Management, posted on X about the advantages of tokenized stocks, comparing them to exchange-traded funds (ETFs). He emphasized several benefits, including 24/7 trading, global distribution, and T+0 settlement, which allows for immediate transaction completion. Hougan noted that tokenized stocks, similar to ETFs, offer diverse advantages that cater to different users' needs. While some investors may prioritize certain benefits, such as tax efficiency, others may find value in different aspects of these financial instruments. Hougan highlighted the versatility of tokenized stocks, suggesting they can serve various purposes for different individuals, much like ETFs do.

data.title: South Korea's People Power Party Challenges Proposed Crypto Exchange Stake Limits
data.description: South Korea's People Power Party (PPP) has expressed opposition to the Financial Services Commission's (FSC) proposal to restrict major shareholders' stakes in cryptocurrency exchanges. According to NS3.AI, the PPP contends that these stake limitations may lead to management confusion and potential capital flight. The party also questions the timing and underlying motives of the proposed regulation, suggesting it could negatively impact the crypto industry in South Korea.

data.title: Market Sentiment Shifts as Risk-Off Season Begins
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X, indicating a shift in market sentiment as the risk-off season appears to be starting. This change suggests investors are becoming more cautious, potentially moving away from high-risk assets. The sentiment reflects broader market trends where uncertainty or volatility prompts a more conservative investment approach.

data.title: Coinbase adds Hyperliquid (HYPE) to its asset roadmap
data.description: Coinbase Markets announced on its X platform that Hyperliquid (HYPE) has been added to its asset roadmap. Asset roadmaps are typically used to disclose tokens that a platform is evaluating or planning to support, but they do not constitute a final listing commitment. Specific listing dates and trading support details are subject to official announcements.

data.title: Spot Gold Experiences Rapid Pullback After Approaching $5,600
data.description: Spot gold prices experienced a swift decline after nearing the $5,600 mark. According to PANews, the current price is reported at $5,530 per ounce, with the daily increase narrowing to 2%.

data.title: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has issued new guidance on tokenized securities, clarifying that tokenization does not alter the application of securities laws.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has issued new guidance on tokenized securities, clarifying that whether a security is regulated depends on its legal nature, not on whether it is tokenized. Tokenization itself does not change the scope of securities laws. The statement further distinguishes between issuer-sponsored tokenized securities and third-party tokenized securities, and covers different structures such as custody and synthetic models, aiming to provide clearer regulatory guidance for market participants to conduct related business within a compliant framework.

data.title: Spot gold approaches $5,600
data.description: Spot gold rose more than $170 in early trading, reaching $5,595 per ounce, a 3% increase on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto Crime Hits $158B in 2025 – But Illicit Use Keeps Falling, Says TRM
data.description:
TRM Labs reports a record $158B in crypto crime in 2025, yet illicit activity as a percentage of total crypto transactions continues to decline, signaling a maturing and more resilient crypto ecosystem.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trm-report-crypto-crime-2025-illicit-use-decline/

data.title: Stablecoin Liquidity Is Shifting Networks, Not Leaving Crypto
data.description:
A decline in ERC-20 stablecoin supply is often interpreted as liquidity exiting the cryptocurrency market. However, on-chain data from CryptoQuant shows a different dynamic unfolding in January 2026. Rather than leaving the system, stablecoin liquidity appears to be rotating across blockchain networks
source: https://www.ethnews.com/stablecoin-liquidity-is-shifting-networks-not-leaving-crypto/

data.title: World token jumps 27% as Sam Altman reportedly eyes a biometric social network to kill off bots
data.description:
The World token experienced a remarkable surge of 27% in value following reports suggesting that Sam Altman, the renowned technology entrepreneur and CEO, is actively exploring the development of a groundbreaking biometric social network. This innovative platform aims to effectively combat the proliferation of automated bots, enhancing the authenticity and quality of online interactions for users. Such a significant move not only reflects growing investor confidence in Altman's vision but also highlights the increasing demand for solutions that ensure genuine engagement in the digital space.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/01/28/world-token-jumps-27-as-sam-altman-reportedly-eyes-a-biometric-social-network-to-kill-off-bots

data.title: Bitcoin Exchange Inflows Sink to Cycle Lows as Selling Pressure Fades
data.description:
Data from CryptoQuant shows that monthly BTC inflows to Binance have fallen to roughly 5,700–5,800 BTC, a level not seen since 2020. This matters because Binance remains the single largest venue for spot BTC liquidity. Persistent changes in its inflow dynamics tend to reflect broader shifts in investor intent rather than isolated exchange-specific behavior
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-exchange-inflows-sink-to-cycle-lows-as-selling-pressure-fades/

data.title: OpenAI Launches Prism to Enhance Scientific Research Collaboration
data.description: OpenAI has unveiled Prism, a complimentary scientific workspace designed to integrate ChatGPT 5.2, aimed at aiding researchers in drafting and collaboration. According to NS3.AI, while the tool shows potential, experts caution about ongoing privacy concerns, intellectual property risks, and the persistent issue of AI hallucinations. OpenAI also suggests a potential long-term transition towards outcome-based pricing in the scientific and high-value research sectors.

data.title: Bitcoin Supply In Loss Turns Upward—Early Bear Market Signal?
data.description:
On-chain data shows the Bitcoin Supply in Loss indicator has witnessed a shift in direction that has often led into bearish phases in past cycles. 365-Day SMA Of The Bitcoin Supply In Loss Has Been Rising Recently As pointed out by an analyst in a CryptoQuant Quicktake post, the Bitcoin Supply in Loss has started to trend up again. This metric measures, as its name suggests, the percentage of the total BTC circulating supply that’s currently being held at some net unrealized loss. Related Reading: Next Ethereum Move Hinges On This Level, Says Glassnode Analyst The indicator works by scanning through the transaction history of each token in circulation to determine the price at which it was last transacted on the network
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-supply-loss-upward-early-bear-market-signal/
